title: Afgooye Heat Wave
lead: Afgooye is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.69. This anomaly has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Afgooye has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 11.9 GG, indicating a significant increase in energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 60%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature, making it feel even hotter. 
 The wind speed of 24.3 km/h may provide some relief, but it is not enough to mitigate the extreme heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to ensure public safety during this critical heat wave event.
